opening_line: The elevator stopped on my floor. Doors won't open. There's breathing from the maintenance hatch. It's not human rhythm.
notes_for_player: CAM 05 — figure on cab roof. Cut power before doors forced open.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Between eight and nine. Panel shows nothing. Lights dimming.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: I only see hands. Through the ceiling panel. No face when the gap widened.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Three minutes. Maybe four. The breathing syncs with the building hum.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: You can see it, right? Tell me to stay calm. Tell me something true.
